channel.title: Python on AI Blog Factory
channel.description: Recent content in Python on AI Blog Factory

item.title: 15 Best Free Websites to Learn Coding in 2026 (Ranked & Reviewed)
item.description: Looking for free coding websites? Here are the 15 best platforms to learn programming in 2026 — ranked by quality, content, and beginner-friendliness.

item.title: Data Science Career Guide 2026: Skills, Salaries & Jobs for Students
item.description: Thinking about a data science career in 2026? This guide covers skills, salaries, career paths, and a semester-by-semester action plan for students.

item.title: How to Build Your First Python Automation Script (Step-by-Step Guide for Beginners)
item.description: Step-by-step guide to building your first Python automation script. Learn file organization, scheduling, web scraping, and more — complete code examples included.
